description: Fast vision-language model. Quick image understanding in a compact 8B package.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
Qwen3-VL 8B is a compact yet powerful vision-language model from the Qwen family. Despite its smaller size, it provides strong multimodal understanding with support for images, documents, and video at 256K context length.

## Key Features
- **Fast Vision**: Quick image processing and understanding
- **Visual Agent**: GUI interaction, tool calling support
- **Visual Coding**: Generate code from design mockups
- **Spatial Understanding**: 2D/3D grounding for spatial reasoning
- **256K Context**: Long context for multi-image and video tasks
- **OCR in 32 Languages**: Expanded multilingual OCR support
- **Thinking Mode**: Optimized variant for STEM reasoning

## Specifications
- Parameters: 8B
- Context Length: 256K tokens
- Modalities: Text + Images + Video
- Default Size: ~6.1GB (Q4_K_M)
modelReadme:
Qwen3-VL is the most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen model family to date. In this generation, there are improvements to the model in many areas: its understanding and generating text, perceiving and reasoning about visual content, supporting longer context lengths, understanding spatial relationships and dynamic videos, or interacting with AI agents.

## Key Features
- **Visual Agent Capabilities**: Operate computer/mobile interfaces, recognize GUI elements, and call tools.
- **Superior Text-Centric Performance**: Joint pretraining of text and visual modalities.
- **Greatly Improved Visual Coding**: Generate code from images or videos.
- **Much Better Spatial Understanding**: 2D and 3D grounding capabilities.
- **Long Context & Long Video Understanding**: Natively supports 256K tokens, expandable to 1M.
- **Stronger Multimodal Reasoning**: Thinking variant optimized for STEM and math.
- **Better OCR Across More Languages**: OCR supports 32 languages.
name: qwen3-vl-8b
title: Qwen 3 VL 8B
